title.en: If he goes in again, maybe he will be the next ...

content.en:
After a while, many of the other side-level geniuses recovered from their injuries.

At this time, they began to discuss whether to enter the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side again.

But some of the other side-level geniuses were apprehensive and didn't want to go in, after all, a other shore-level genius had just fallen.

If he goes in again, maybe he will be the next one to fall!

But the final decision is still the Lord of Xuanmiao, she said that if she enters, she has to go in, after all, they signed a contract with the Xiao family.

At this time, a genius of the other side level persuaded the Lord of the Mysteries: "Lord of the Mysteries, the depths of the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side are too dangerous, we can escape this time, but not necessarily next time!

"yes!"

Other other shore-level geniuses should be in harmony.

However, the Lord of the Mystic naturally did not want to give up such an opportunity.

So, she said: "Everyone, there are a large number of Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side in the depths of the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side, do you want to give up? I have a formation, you can learn it, and when the time comes, you can attract these Void Bamboo Bees over, and then trap and kill them." And, how about I promise you double your pay?"

As soon as the Lord of Mystery said this, many other level geniuses were moved.

"Okay, I agree!"

The other side-level genius who had just objected immediately agreed.

After all, there are more benefits, and the risk is also deserved.

Subsequently.

They entered the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side one after another, and then cautiously.

It didn't take long for them to approach the depths of the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side.

Then.

The Lord of Mystery made many other level geniuses stop, and she was about to set up the magic circle.

"The magic circle I arranged is called the Eight Gate Realm Killing Array, and it needs to be maintained by a minimum of eight Heavenly Ancestors, and a maximum of eighty-one Heavenly Ancestors. I will give you the key to control the formation, and many of them will urge this Eight Gate Realm Killing Array together. Once a lot of Void Bamboo Bees are introduced, directly open a large array to trap and kill them. The Lord of Mystery said.

Then.

A Peer-level genius asked, "Lord of Mystery, this method is not bad, but who is going to lure those Void Bamboo Bees?"

A group of geniuses on the other side looked at each other, they didn't dare to go, once they were surrounded, they would definitely die!

The Lord of Mystery looked at Ye Tian, "Lord of Endless, can you help attract a swarm of Void Bamboo Bees, once successful, I will give you an additional five times the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate and agreed directly.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Mystic Universe arranged the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array here, and the formation bases made of precious materials were taken out.

After a period of time, this Eight Gates Realm Killing Array was successfully arranged.

"Please, Lord of Endless!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian came out directly from the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array, and then headed towards the depths of the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side.

......

Soon.

He came to the location where he encountered the Void Bamboo Bee at the beginning, and also found those few Origin Bamboos on the other side that had not been broken, and there were all Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side!

However, he didn't plan to take away the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side inside, and they would definitely know about it later.

Therefore, he searched in other places now to see if he could find other Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side.

Really.

He found it.

Rumble!!!

He attacked with all his strength, and it was very easy to break through the Origin Bamboo on the other side, and took away the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side, and the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side belonged to him.

Just after he took away several of the other side of the origin bamboo, some void bamboo bees appeared around.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, and shuttled towards the Eight Gate Realm Killing Array at a speed that was neither fast nor slow.

He was afraid that these Void Bamboo Bees would not be able to catch up, so his speed slowed down a lot.

Buzz Buzz !!!

A large number of Void Bamboo Bees appeared, chasing after him.

Ye Tian kept fighting with this group of Void Bamboo Bees, killing one Void Bamboo Bee after another, and putting away their corpses.

But as the number of Void Bamboo Bees grew, he couldn't bear it anymore.

Thereupon.

He quickly fled, luring the Void Bees over.

......

In the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array.

A group of other shore-level geniuses waited silently, and they were not in a hurry.

Soon.

They all sensed the breath of a swarm of ethereal bees.

"The Void Bamboo Bee is here, everyone prepare!"

The Lord of Mystery reminded.

Rumble!!!!

A group of other shore-level geniuses began to prepare, and they could open the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array at any time.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over and directly introduced these Void Bamboo Bees into the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array.

At the moment when this group of Void Bamboo Bees entered the Eight Gates Realm Killing Formation, the formation opened.

Rumble!!!!

The Eight Gates Realm Killing Array turned into Void Worlds one after another, trapping these Void Bamboo Bees in these Void Worlds.

Immediately after, all the other side-level geniuses urged the formation, suppressed their speed and strength, and manipulated the formation to attack them.

Occasionally, the other side-level genius would personally attack and kill them.

Gradually, one after another Void Bamboo Bees were killed.

Time passed slowly, and the number of Void Bamboo Bees in the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array became smaller and smaller.

After a long time, all the Void Bamboo Bees were killed.

After killing these Void Bamboo Bees, the Lord of Mystery began to divide the Void Bamboo Honey in the bodies of these Void Bamboo Bees.

Since this set of formations was arranged by the Lord of Mystery, and he hired these geniuses of the other side, half of the Void Bamboo Honey went to the Lord of Mystery.

If it was a single Void Bamboo Bee, she wouldn't be able to look down on it, but with so many Void Bamboo Bees, she would naturally look at it.

Thereupon.

The Lord of Mystery collected half of the Void Bamboo Honey, and Ye Tian attracted the Void Bamboo Bees, so he also obtained a lot of Void Bamboo Honey.

As for the other other side-level geniuses, they were also distributed in a normal way.

Although some of the other side level geniuses were not satisfied, they did not dare to disobey the words of the Lord of Mysteries.

So, that's it.

Then.

Ye Tian asked, "Do you still need to continue to lure the Void Bamboo Bee over?"

Then.

A genius of the other side level said: "There may not be many void bamboo bees left, there should be no problem, I think we can go directly to the other side of the origin bamboo pith to save time." "

The other other shore-level geniuses also said the same, and they all felt that they could directly go to find the Origin Bamboo Essence of the other side.

And Ye Tian knew their thoughts.

They felt that they might take the opportunity to scrape the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore, then he would be able to obtain a large amount of the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore, and the other Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore would be much less distributed by the other Shore level geniuses at that time.

That's why they don't agree with him continuing to attract the Void Bamboo Bee.

However, let them go and attract the Void Bamboo Bee, they don't dare!
